name: kemu.io.file-system
title: File System
description: Allows access to the file system to scan, read and write files and directories

inputs.name: ignorePaths
inputs.description: A comma separated list of paths to ignore

inputs.name: scan
inputs.description: Executes the scan operation when this input is triggered

variants.name: Glob Filter
variants.description: Filters a list of files based on a list of glob patterns

outputs.name: files
outputs.description: A filtered list of file paths

variants.name: Filter Mime Type
variants.description: Filters a list of files based on a list of mime types

outputs.name: files
outputs.description: A filtered list of file paths

variants.name: Read Contents
variants.description: Reads the contents of a file or a list of files. If a single file path is provided, the contents will be returned as a 'DataType.BinaryFile' object. If a list of file paths is provided, the contents will be returned as an 'Array' of 'DataType.BinaryFile' objects.

inputs.name: files
inputs.description: A list of file paths to read or a single file path

outputs.name: contents
outputs.description: A list of file contents in 'DataType.BinaryFile' format

variants.name: Write Contents
variants.description: Writes the contents of a file

inputs.name: path
inputs.description: The full path to the file to write

inputs.name: write
inputs.description: Executes the write operation when this input is triggered

outputs.name: success
outputs.description: Whether the file was written successfully

variants.name: File To Text
variants.description: Converts a binary file to text using the specified encoding

inputs.name: file
inputs.description: The binary file to convert to text

outputs.name: text
outputs.description: The file contents as text in the specified encoding

variants.name: Delete File
variants.description: Deletes a file or directory at the specified path

inputs.name: path
inputs.description: The full path to the file or directory to delete

inputs.name: delete
inputs.description: Executes the delete operation when this input is triggered

author: 0f998d5a-a8ce-4bf8-9f84-fa8c481cb40b
